title: plectranthus scutellarioides
intro: Plectranthus scutellarioides, also known as Coleus forskohlii or forskohlii, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa, characterized by its distinctive leaves and yellow, orange, or red flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and cardiovascular benefits. The health benefits of Plectranthus scutellarioides include lowering blood pressure, reducing inflammation, and improving heart health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal preparations for cardiovascular support. Plectranthus scutellarioides can be prepared as a supplement, tea, or extract, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
